evals.prompt: In src/components/Hero.ts, implement Element.animate behavior for a product surface and explain the validation gates.
evals.expected_output: Uses web-waapi routing, checks installed versions, applies domain-specific WAAPI guidance, runs or recommends the bundled audit CLI where relevant, and reports validation evidence.
assertions: Mentions the relevant installed package/runtime/version checks for WAAPI.
Uses at least one web-waapi bundled reference or explains why no extra reference was needed.
Includes reduced-motion/accessibility or explains why the effect is essential and already covered.

Includes cleanup/interruption/runtime validation appropriate to Browser Web Animations API: Element.animate(), Animation, KeyframeEffect, playback control, generated keyframes, cancel/finish, commitStyles, and cleanup..
Does not route the task to an unrelated near-miss skill.
